intro: The Spot Catering ("we," "us," or "our"), operated by MNS Worldwide LLC, is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website or use our services.

blocks.text: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide to us when you:

items: Fill out our contact or quote request forms
Subscribe to our newsletter or marketing communications
Book catering services with us
Communicate with us via email, phone, or social media
Name and contact information (email address, phone number)
Company or organization name
Event details (date, location, guest count, dietary requirements)
Billing and payment information
Any other information you choose to provide

blocks.text: When you visit our website, we may automatically collect certain information, including:

items: Device information (browser type, operating system)
IP address and approximate geographic location
Pages visited and time spent on our website
Referring website or source
Cookies and similar tracking technologies

blocks.text: We use the information we collect to:

items: Respond to your inquiries and provide quotes
Process and fulfill catering orders
Communicate with you about your events and our services
Send promotional materials (with your consent)
Improve our website and services
Comply with legal obligations
Protect against fraudulent or illegal activity

blocks.text: We do not sell, trade, or rent your personal information to third parties. We may share your information with:

items.label: Service Providers:
items.text: Third-party vendors who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or serving you (e.g., payment processors, email service providers)

items.label: Legal Requirements:
items.text: When required by law or to protect our rights, safety, or property

items.label: Business Transfers:
items.text: In connection with a merger, acquisition, or sale of assets

blocks.text: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance your experience on our website. You can control cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling cookies may affect the functionality of our website.

We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.
Depending on your location, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information:

items.label: Access:
items.text: Request a copy of the personal information we hold about you

items.label: Correction:
items.text: Request that we correct inaccurate or incomplete information

items.label: Deletion:
items.text: Request that we delete your personal information

items.label: Opt-Out:
items.text: Unsubscribe from marketing communications at any time

blocks.text: To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided below.
If you are a Colorado resident, the Colorado Privacy Act (CPA) provides you with specific rights regarding your personal data. You have the right to:

items: Confirm whether we are processing your personal data
Access your personal data
Correct inaccuracies in your personal data
Delete your personal data
Obtain a portable copy of your personal data
Opt out of targeted advertising, sale of personal data, or profiling

blocks.text: Our website and services are not directed to children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe we have collected information from a child under 13, please contact us immediately.

Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or content of these websites. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of any third-party sites you visit.

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated version will be indicated by the "Last Updated" date at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically.
If you have questions or concerns about this Privacy Policy or our privacy practices, please contact us:
